executive_summary: Iteration 000026 is substantially implemented in the backend but critically incomplete in the frontend. US-002 (Backend LLM orchestration service) and US-003 (Wire LLM orchestration into the video generation pipeline) are fully implemented and tested, meeting all acceptance criteria and functional requirements. US-001 (Frontend single-prompt input) is NOT implemented: the commit labeled 'feat: implement US-001' only updated progress-tracking JSON files and made zero changes to the frontend source. The 'llm' mode is absent from the frontend GenerationMode type, the UI, and all frontend tests. End-to-end functionality is therefore blocked. All 8 functional requirements are satisfied at the backend layer; FR-5 (orchestration_service startup registered in main.py) and the Pydantic validation (FR-8) are properly implemented. The backend API is production-ready and would correctly handle direct HTTP POST requests with mode='llm'.

verification_by_fr.notes: GenerateRequestBody in backend/models/schemas.py (line 29) includes 'llm' as a valid Literal. A model validator (lines 71-75) enforces that prompt is required when mode is 'llm'.
load_llm_pipeline() in orchestration_service.py imports and uses comfy_diffusion.textgen (generate_text and generate_ltx2_prompt) as required.
The CREATIVE_DIRECTOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT instructs strict Danbooru tag order. The image_prompt field validator (lines 57-64) enforces the required quality prefix 'score_9, score_8, best quality, highres'.
video_service.generate_video_mp4_for_request() remains the single orchestration entry point. All modes (text, text-and-parameters, parameters, llm) are dispatched from within this function.
orchestration_service.startup() is called in backend/main.py (line 19) alongside other service startups.
load_llm_pipeline() in orchestration_service.py (lines 86-88) logs a warning and returns None if REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_PATH is not set, enabling graceful degradation.
REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_PATH controls the model checkpoint (line 86) and REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE controls the model type (line 95, defaults to 'llm').

LLM output is parsed and validated via the OrchestrationResult Pydantic model in two passes: immediately after JSON parsing (line 187) and after LTX2 prompt generation (lines 193-199). ValidationError is caught and re-raised as OrchestrationFailedError.

verification_by_us.notes: Frontend implementation is entirely absent. The commit 0981c12 labeled 'feat: implement US-001 - Frontend single-prompt input' only modified .agents/flow/it_000026_progress.json and .agents/state.json — no frontend source files were changed. Specific gaps: (1) GenerationMode type in App.tsx (line 8) does not include 'llm'; (2) the mode selector options array has no 'llm' entry; (3) no conditional hiding of parameter controls for llm mode; (4) textarea placeholder still reads 'Describe the music you want...' with no creative director reference; (5) no frontend tests for llm mode; (6) Generate button cannot dispatch mode='llm' requests.

All 8 acceptance criteria are met. orchestration_service.py exposes load_llm_pipeline() and orchestrate(). The CREATIVE_DIRECTOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT instructs the model correctly. audio_prompt, image_prompt (Danbooru order), and video_prompt (LTX-Video 2 single paragraph) are properly prompted and validated. Graceful failure when pipeline not loaded is implemented. Unit tests in test_orchestration_service.py cover all required scenarios and pass.

All 4 acceptance criteria are met. GenerateRequestBody includes 'llm' literal. video_service.generate_video_mp4_for_request() correctly detects mode=='llm', calls orchestrate(), and uses the resulting prompts for audio, image, and video pipelines. Existing modes are unaffected. pytest passes.

minor_observations: OrchestrationFailedError is not explicitly registered as an exception handler in backend/routes/api.py; it is caught by the generic VideoGenerationFailedError handler. This means the HTTP 500 response body does not distinguish orchestration failures from other video generation failures. Consider adding a dedicated handler to return a more descriptive error code/message.

REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE env var name differs from what FR-7 describes ('REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_TYPE'). The implementation uses 'REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE'. This naming inconsistency between the PRD and code may cause confusion for operators configuring the service.
US-001-AC09 states 'Typecheck / lint passes'. This currently passes trivially because no llm-related frontend code exists yet. It will need re-verification once US-001 is actually implemented.
The progress.json marks US-001 status as 'completed' with last_agent_exit_code: 0, which is misleading given no frontend code was written.
conclusions_and_recommendations: The backend for iteration 000026 is production-ready: US-002 and US-003 are fully implemented, all 8 functional requirements are satisfied, and unit tests pass. The critical blocker is US-001: the frontend single-prompt input was never implemented. The iteration cannot be considered complete until the frontend is updated to: (1) add 'llm' to GenerationMode type; (2) add an llm mode option to the UI selector; (3) hide parameter controls (mood, style, tempo, duration) in llm mode; (4) update the textarea placeholder to reference the creative director role; (5) ensure the Generate button sends { mode: 'llm', prompt, targetWidth, targetHeight }; (6) add frontend tests for the llm flow. Additionally, the env var naming discrepancy (REELPOD_LLM_CLIP_TYPE vs REELPOD_LLM_MODEL_TYPE) should be resolved in documentation or code. Recommended action: implement US-001 before closing this iteration.
